content.speakerText: Why do you want to work here specifically?
content.speakerTextCn: 你为什么特别想来我们公司？
expectedAnswers: I've been following your recent product launches, and I'm inspired by how you turn user feedback into real features. This is exactly the kind of impact I want to make.
I admire your commitment to diversity and inclusion—I've worked in teams where voices weren't heard, and I want to be part of a place that values everyone.
Your mission to democratize AI aligns with my personal values, and this role gives me the chance to contribute meaningfully.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了对公司独特性的认同
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的职场表达，如 'turn feedback into features', 'democratize AI'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'impact', 'mission', 'values', 'culture' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: How does this position fit into your career trajectory?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个职位如何契合你的职业发展路径？
expectedAnswers: I'm aiming to grow into a senior role within three years, and this position offers the mentorship and project diversity I need to get there.
This role bridges my past experience in marketing with my goal to lead product teams—I see it as the missing link in my career path.
After two years in startups, I'm looking for a stable yet innovative environment to deepen my expertise, and your company is the ideal balance.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰连接当前职位与未来目标
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'career trajectory', 'mentorship', 'project diversity' 等高级词汇
表达自然度：是否避免了机械背诵，展现出个人化思考
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'growth', 'expertise', 'balance', 'path' 等职业发展关键词

content.speakerText: What about our company culture makes you think you'll succeed here?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们公司的哪种文化让你觉得你能在这里成功？
expectedAnswers: Your emphasis on psychological safety means I can speak up without fear—I’ve thrived in environments where feedback is encouraged.
The flat hierarchy and cross-functional collaboration match how I work best—I’m most productive when I’m close to the people solving problems.
I’ve read about your weekly innovation hours, and that kind of trust in employee initiative is rare—I’d be motivated to contribute more.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确关联公司文化与个人工作风格
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的表达如 'psychological safety', 'flat hierarchy', 'initiative'
表达自然度：是否避免了模板化回答，体现出真实理解
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'culture', 'collaboration', 'trust', 'initiative' 等核心文化关键词
